title: Google Finance Intraday Scraper
description: Fetch minute-level Google Finance price and volume graph points for one or more ticker symbols.

symbols.title: Symbols
symbols.description: Ticker symbols to process in one Apify run. Batching avoids one run per ticker and keeps Apify overhead low.

symbol.title: Symbol
symbol.description: Ticker symbol to fetch, such as AAPL, MSFT, TSLA, or VOO.

exchange.title: Exchange
exchange.description: Google Finance exchange code, such as NASDAQ, NYSE, NSE, LON, TSE, or CRYPTO. Recommended to avoid symbol ambiguity.

hl.title: Language
hl.description: Google Finance language code, such as en, de, es, or zh-cn.

gl.title: Country
gl.description: Two-letter country code, such as us, gb, de, or ca.
